title: papaver pyrenaicum var. aurantiacum
intro: Papaver pyrenaicum var. aurantiacum is a variety of the Pyrenean poppy, a flowering plant native to the Pyrenees Mountains in Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for relieving pain and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Papaver pyrenaicum var. aurantiacum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
